summary: Iteration 36 - Tested new features: 1) accept_offline_challenges=True for new users (backend fix applied), 2) Notification click navigation with ChevronRight arrows, 3) Film/offline/trailer notifications have path field. Battle animation code verified but not tested due to no films.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 36 features verified: 1) New users are created with accept_offline_challenges=True (fixed UserResponse model to include this field). 2) Notifications at /notifications show ChevronRight (>) icons for clickable notifications. 3) Clicking notifications navigates to correct pages (/challenges for challenge_welcome, etc.). 4) film_released, offline_challenge_result, offline_challenge_report notifications now include 'path' field in data. 5) Battle animation code (lines 3491-3600) correctly shows one match per page (steps 2,3,4) with 'Manche Successiva'/'Indietro' navigation buttons (data-testid='match-next-0/1/2'). Battle animation could not be live-tested as test users have no films. To test battle animation, need to create films for users first.

frontend_tests_details.notifications_page: PASSED - /notifications shows 3 notifications with ChevronRight arrows for clickable ones
frontend_tests_details.notification_click_navigation: PASSED - Clicking 'Challenges Unlocked!' notification navigated from /notifications to /challenges
frontend_tests_details.battle_animation: CODE VERIFIED - Lines 3491-3600 show correct implementation: steps 2,3,4 for matches 0,1,2, with navigation buttons and data-testids. Live test not possible without films.

bug_fixes_applied.description: Added 'accept_offline_challenges: bool = True' to UserResponse model so the field is returned in API responses
